headline: How The M&T Bank (MTB) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: M&T Bank's refreshed valuation work nudges its fair value estimate slightly higher, from about US$233.0 to roughly US$235.5 per share, a modest 1.1% uplift. That small move comes as analysts split, with some lifting targets into the mid to high US$200s and others arguing that recent share price strength already reflects much of the medium term story. Read on to see how you can track these shifting views and what to watch as the narrative continues to evolve. Analyst Price Targets don't always...
